description_for_human: Connect your ESPN, Yahoo, and Sleeper fantasy leagues to AI for read-only analysis of rosters, matchups, standings, free agents, and transactions.
description_for_model: Flaim provides read-only access to fantasy sports league data from ESPN, Yahoo, and Sleeper. Use it to answer questions about a user's real fantasy roster, matchups, standings, waiver wire, and transactions across football, baseball, basketball, and hockey.
